title: Viguieranthus perrieri

The classification of Viguieranthus perrieri places it in the kingdom Plantae, further dividing into the clade Angiosperms, then Eudicots, and finally Sapindales. The plant's classification is a result of its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other members of the Sapindaceae family. As a species within this family, Viguieranthus perrieri plays a distinct role in the biodiversity of Madagascar.
